title: AI Lead Engineer
company_focus: Global advertising and digital marketing services
description:
The purpose of this role is to provide technical guidance
and suggest improvements in development processes. Develop
required software features, achieving timely delivery in
compliance with the performance and quality standards of the
company.

Job Description:

Senior Applied AI / GenAI Specialist

Theme: Scalable Systems & Technical Leadership

- Design and deliver scalable AI and GenAI systems combining
  ML models, LLMs, retrieval, orchestration, and data
  pipelines
- Lead solution design for complex, ambiguous problems where
  requirements and success criteria evolve
- Make architectural trade-offs across model selection,
  retrieval strategies, cost, latency, and scalability
- Drive solutions from proof-of-concept to production-grade
  systems used across multiple teams
- Act as a technical anchor for high-impact AI initiatives,
  guiding implementation without formal people management
- Ensure robustness, observability, and optimization of AI
  systems in real-world environments
- Location: Bangalore (preferred)
- YOE: 5–8 years

Location:

DGS India - Mumbai - Thane Ashar IT Park

Brand:

Merkle

Time Type:

Full time

Contract Type:

Permanent

use_cases: Scalable GenAI system design and delivery for enterprise clients
AI-powered solutions for marketing and creative services (Dentsu Creative/Merkle)
Production-grade AI systems serving multiple internal teams
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly focused on designing and delivering
AI/GenAI systems, including ML models, LLMs, retrieval,
orchestration, and data pipelines. The engineer makes
architectural decisions about model selection, retrieval
strategies, and drives solutions from POC to production,
which is hands-on work building and deploying AI systems.
